name: Paladin

skills: Choose two from Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Medicine, Persuasion, and Religion

startingEquipment: a martial weapon and a shield or two martial weapons
five javelins or any simple melee weapon
a priest's pack or an explorer's pack
Chain mail and a holy symbol

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: The presence of strong evil registers on your senses like a noxious odor, and powerful good rings like heavenly music in your ears.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: Your blessed touch can heal wounds. You have a pool of healing power that replenishes when you take a long rest.

name: Wizard

skills: Choose two from Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, and Religion

startingEquipment: a component pouch or an arcane focus
a scholar's pack or an explorer's pack

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: You have learned to regain some of your magical energy by studying your spellbook.
